query: Write me documentation for our new user authentication flow.
expected_behavior: Asks which Diataxis type is needed before writing (Tutorial, How-To, Reference, or Explanation)
Does not mix Diataxis types in a single document
Structures the output with headers, numbered steps (for How-To/Tutorial), or tables (for Reference)
Refuses to fabricate API endpoints or config values — flags any unknown details as placeholders
Produces output that is scannable, not a wall of prose
